turns.query: Analyze how strong wind conditions on 2025-04-10 between 08:00-12:00 affected the pollution dispersion from Tangshan Ruifeng Steel Group Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2420).
turns.actual_response:
2025年4月10日08:00—12:00，唐山瑞丰钢铁（集团）有限公司周边10公里网格风场无可用记录，因此采用企业所在区县小时气象数据分析强风扩散影响。该时段共有5个小时排放记录，烟气总量为78,854,600.0立方米，小时峰值烟气量为16,119,700.0立方米；NOx总排放量为364.518005千克。企业10公里范围内共有4个空气质量站点，均有完整小时观测记录。

该时段区县平均风速为2.20米/秒，最大风速为3.20米/秒，平均风力1.6级、最大2级；主导风向为东南风，按气象定义表示气流主要由东南向西北输送，平均输送方向约为40.16°，即整体偏向东北方向。风速在11:00—12:00明显增强，由08:00—10:00的1.4—1.9米/秒升至3.1—3.2米/秒。

从污染扩散表现看，强风增强阶段对应周边站点污染水平下降：10公里内4个站点平均AQI由10:00的94.00降至11:00的81.50、12:00的76.75；PM2.5由69.75降至55.00、50.00；PM10由109.25降至99.75、94.25；SO2由24.25降至15.75、14.50。同期企业烟气排放量反而从15,720,100.0立方米升至16,119,700.0立方米，NOx小时排放量维持在约70—74千克，说明污染物浓度下降更可能与风速增强导致的稀释和输送扩散增强有关，而不是企业排放强度降低造成的。

空间方向上，下风向2个站点的平均AQI为96.7，高于上风向2个站点的76.4；下风向PM2.5为66.5，高于上风向54.5；PM10为119.1，高于上风向87.2；SO2为23.7，高于上风向11.7；CO为1.87，高于上风向0.58。这表明污染物在主导输送方向上存在一定累积或传输影响。NO2则表现为上风向40.8高于下风向29.3，未显示与该企业主导输送方向一致的增强特征。

综合判断：08:00—10:00风速较弱，周边颗粒物和AQI处于较高水平；11:00后风速增强，尽管企业烟气排放量达到时段高位，周边站点污染物浓度仍整体下降，说明较强风条件增强了污染稀释和外输能力。但下风向站点污染水平仍系统性高于上风向，提示该企业排放在主导风向下仍可能对下风向局地空气质量产生传输影响。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-04-10 08:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-04-10 12:00:00"
company_id = 2420

# 1) 企业位置与时段排放汇总（按08:00、09:00、10:00、11:00、12:00整点纳入）
q_emis = text("""
WITH c AS (
  SELECT id, name, coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = :company_id
),
e AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_hours,
         SUM(exhaust_gas)::float AS total_flue_gas,
         MAX(exhaust_gas)::float AS peak_flue_gas,
         SUM(nox)::float AS total_nox,
         AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS avg_flue_gas,
         AVG(nox)::float AS avg_nox
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp <= :end_ts
),
s AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS stations_within_10km
  FROM air_quality_station a, c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
)
SELECT c.name, e.n_hours, e.total_flue_gas, e.peak_flue_gas, e.total_nox, e.avg_flue_gas, e.avg_nox, s.stations_within_10km
FROM c CROSS JOIN e CROSS JOIN s
""")
emis_summary = pd.read_sql(q_emis, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
total_flue_gas = float(emis_summary.loc[0, "total_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(emis_summary.loc[0, "total_flue_gas"]) else None
peak_flue_gas = float(emis_summary.loc[0, "peak_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(emis_summary.loc[0, "peak_flue_gas"]) else None
total_nox = float(emis_summary.loc[0, "total_nox"]) if pd.notna(emis_summary.loc[0, "total_nox"]) else None
stations_within_10km = int(emis_summary.loc[0, "stations_within_10km"])
print("排放与站点覆盖汇总：")
print(emis_summary.to_string(index=False))

# 2) 大表查询前计数：企业周边10公里、指定时段网格风场记录数
q_wind_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n_wind_records
FROM hourly_grid_wind w
JOIN polluting_company c ON c.id = :company_id
WHERE w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
  AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
""")
wind_count = pd.read_sql(q_wind_count, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("周边10公里网格风场记录数：")
print(wind_count.to_string(index=False))

# 3) 风场聚合：风速强度、主导风向、按小时变化
q_wind_agg = text("""
WITH base AS (
  SELECT w.timestamp, w.wind_speed, w.wind_degree, w.wind_direction,
         sin(radians(w.wind_degree)) AS s, cos(radians(w.wind_degree)) AS c
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w
  JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :company_id
  WHERE w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
    AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
),
overall AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n,
         AVG(wind_speed)::float AS avg_wind_speed,
         MAX(wind_speed)::float AS max_wind_speed,
         MIN(wind_speed)::float AS min_wind_speed,
         percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wind_speed)::float AS median_wind_speed,
         degrees(atan2(AVG(s), AVG(c)))::float AS mean_from_degree_raw
  FROM base
),
dir_mode AS (
  SELECT wind_direction, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM base
  GROUP BY wind_direction
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT overall.n, avg_wind_speed, max_wind_speed, min_wind_speed, median_wind_speed,
       CASE WHEN mean_from_degree_raw < 0 THEN mean_from_degree_raw + 360 ELSE mean_from_degree_raw END AS mean_from_degree,
       ((CASE WHEN mean_from_degree_raw < 0 THEN mean_from_degree_raw + 360 ELSE mean_from_degree_raw END) + 180) % 360 AS mean_to_degree,
       dir_mode.wind_direction AS dominant_wind_direction, dir_mode.cnt AS dominant_direction_count
FROM overall CROSS JOIN dir_mode
""")
wind_summary = pd.read_sql(q_wind_agg, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("周边10公里风场总体汇总：")
print(wind_summary.to_string(index=False))

q_wind_hourly = text("""
SELECT timestamp,
       COUNT(*) AS n,
       AVG(wind_speed)::float AS avg_wind_speed,
       MAX(wind_speed)::float AS max_wind_speed,
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wind_speed)::float AS median_wind_speed
FROM hourly_grid_wind w
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :company_id
WHERE w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
  AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
GROUP BY timestamp
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
wind_hourly = pd.read_sql(q_wind_hourly, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("逐小时风速汇总：")
print(wind_hourly.to_string(index=False))

# 4) 站点空气质量聚合：按主导输送方向分为下风向/侧风向/上风向
q_station_sector = text("""
WITH params AS (
  SELECT pc.coordinate AS coord,
         ws.mean_to_degree
  FROM polluting_company pc
  CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT ((CASE WHEN degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(w.wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(w.wind_degree))))) < 0
                  THEN degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(w.wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(w.wind_degree))))) + 360
                  ELSE degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(w.wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(w.wind_degree)))))
             END) + 180) % 360 AS mean_to_degree
    FROM hourly_grid_wind w
    JOIN polluting_company pc2 ON pc2.id = :company_id
    WHERE w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
      AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, pc2.coordinate, 10000)
  ) ws
  WHERE pc.id = :company_id
),
station_metrics AS (
  SELECT a.id,
         ST_Distance(a.coordinate, p.coord)::float AS dist_m,
         degrees(ST_Azimuth(p.coord::geometry, a.coordinate::geometry)) AS bearing_deg,
         p.mean_to_degree
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, p.coord, 10000)
),
classified AS (
  SELECT id, dist_m, bearing_deg,
         LEAST(ABS(bearing_deg - mean_to_degree), 360 - ABS(bearing_deg - mean_to_degree)) AS angle_diff,
         CASE
           WHEN LEAST(ABS(bearing_deg - mean_to_degree), 360 - ABS(bearing_deg - mean_to_degree)) <= 45 THEN '下风向'
           WHEN LEAST(ABS(bearing_deg - ((mean_to_degree + 180) % 360)), 360 - ABS(bearing_deg - ((mean_to_degree + 180) % 360))) <= 45 THEN '上风向'
           ELSE '侧风向'
         END AS sector
  FROM station_metrics
),
aq AS (
  SELECT c.sector, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id)::int AS station_count,
         COUNT(h.id)::int AS reading_count,
         AVG(c.dist_m)::float AS avg_distance_m,
         AVG(h.aqi)::float AS avg_aqi,
         MAX(h.aqi)::int AS max_aqi,
         AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS avg_pm25,
         AVG(h.pm10)::float AS avg_pm10,
         AVG(h.no2)::float AS avg_no2,
         AVG(h.so2)::float AS avg_so2,
         AVG(h.co)::float AS avg_co
  FROM classified c
  LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
    ON h.station_id = c.id AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts AND h.timestamp <= :end_ts
  GROUP BY c.sector
)
SELECT * FROM aq ORDER BY sector
""")
station_sector = pd.read_sql(q_station_sector, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("10公里内站点按相对风向的空气质量汇总：")
print(station_sector.to_string(index=False))

# 5) 站点整体时段内逐小时变化，用于判断稀释/扩散趋势
q_station_hourly = text("""
SELECT h.timestamp,
       COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)::int AS station_count,
       AVG(h.aqi)::float AS avg_aqi,
       AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS avg_pm25,
       AVG(h.pm10)::float AS avg_pm10,
       AVG(h.no2)::float AS avg_no2,
       AVG(h.so2)::float AS avg_so2
FROM air_quality_station a
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :company_id
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = a.id
WHERE h.timestamp >= :start_ts AND h.timestamp <= :end_ts
  AND ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
GROUP BY h.timestamp
ORDER BY h.timestamp
""")
station_hourly = pd.read_sql(q_station_hourly, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("10公里内站点逐小时空气质量汇总：")
print(station_hourly.to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text
import math

start_ts = "2025-04-10 08:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-04-10 12:00:00"
company_id = 2420

# 补充查询：因企业周边10公里网格风场记录为0，改用企业所在区县/城市小时气象记录表征强风条件
q_weather = text("""
WITH pc AS (
  SELECT id, city_id, district_id FROM polluting_company WHERE id=:company_id
),
dw AS (
  SELECT '区县' AS scope, COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(wind_speed)::float AS avg_wind_speed, MAX(wind_speed)::float AS max_wind_speed,
         AVG(wind_scale)::float AS avg_wind_scale, MAX(wind_scale)::int AS max_wind_scale,
         degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree)))))::float AS mean_from_raw
  FROM hourly_district_weather h JOIN pc ON h.district_id=pc.district_id
  WHERE h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
),
cw AS (
  SELECT '城市' AS scope, COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(wind_speed)::float AS avg_wind_speed, MAX(wind_speed)::float AS max_wind_speed,
         AVG(wind_scale)::float AS avg_wind_scale, MAX(wind_scale)::int AS max_wind_scale,
         degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree)))))::float AS mean_from_raw
  FROM hourly_city_weather h JOIN pc ON h.city_id=pc.city_id
  WHERE h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
),
mode_dir AS (
  SELECT scope, wind_direction, cnt FROM (
    SELECT '区县' AS scope, wind_direction, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY '区县' ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
    FROM hourly_district_weather h JOIN pc ON h.district_id=pc.district_id
    WHERE h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
    GROUP BY wind_direction
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '城市' AS scope, wind_direction, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY '城市' ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
    FROM hourly_city_weather h JOIN pc ON h.city_id=pc.city_id
    WHERE h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
    GROUP BY wind_direction
  ) x WHERE rn=1
)
SELECT w.scope, w.n, w.avg_wind_speed, w.max_wind_speed, w.avg_wind_scale, w.max_wind_scale,
       CASE WHEN w.mean_from_raw < 0 THEN w.mean_from_raw + 360 ELSE w.mean_from_raw END AS mean_from_degree,
       CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN w.mean_from_raw < 0 THEN w.mean_from_raw + 360 ELSE w.mean_from_raw END) + 180 >= 360
            THEN (CASE WHEN w.mean_from_raw < 0 THEN w.mean_from_raw + 360 ELSE w.mean_from_raw END) - 180
            ELSE (CASE WHEN w.mean_from_raw < 0 THEN w.mean_from_raw + 360 ELSE w.mean_from_raw END) + 180
       END AS mean_to_degree,
       m.wind_direction AS dominant_wind_direction, m.cnt AS dominant_direction_count
FROM (SELECT * FROM dw UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cw) w
LEFT JOIN mode_dir m ON w.scope=m.scope
ORDER BY CASE WHEN w.scope='区县' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
""")
weather_summary = pd.read_sql(q_weather, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("企业所在区县/城市强风条件汇总：")
print(weather_summary.to_string(index=False))

# 站点空气质量记录计数
q_station_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n_station_readings
FROM air_quality_station a
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id=:company_id
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=a.id
WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
  AND h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
""")
station_reading_count = pd.read_sql(q_station_count, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("10公里内站点空气质量记录数：")
print(station_reading_count.to_string(index=False))

# 使用可用的最近尺度风向（优先区县，其次城市）划分站点相对下风/上风/侧风，输出聚合统计
valid_weather = weather_summary[weather_summary["n"] > 0].copy()
chosen = valid_weather.iloc[0] if len(valid_weather) else None
mean_to_degree = float(chosen["mean_to_degree"]) if chosen is not None and pd.notna(chosen["mean_to_degree"]) else None

q_station_metrics = text("""
SELECT a.id AS station_id,
       ST_Distance(a.coordinate, pc.coordinate)::float AS distance_m,
       degrees(ST_Azimuth(pc.coordinate::geometry, a.coordinate::geometry))::float AS bearing_deg,
       AVG(h.aqi)::float AS avg_aqi, MAX(h.aqi)::int AS max_aqi,
       AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS avg_pm25, AVG(h.pm10)::float AS avg_pm10,
       AVG(h.no2)::float AS avg_no2, AVG(h.so2)::float AS avg_so2, AVG(h.co)::float AS avg_co,
       COUNT(h.id)::int AS reading_count
FROM air_quality_station a
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id=:company_id
LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=a.id AND h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
GROUP BY a.id, distance_m, bearing_deg
""")
station_metrics = pd.read_sql(q_station_metrics, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

if mean_to_degree is not None and len(station_metrics):
    def sector(b):
        d = abs(b - mean_to_degree); d = min(d, 360 - d)
        u = abs(b - ((mean_to_degree + 180) % 360)); u = min(u, 360 - u)
        if d <= 45: return "下风向"
        if u <= 45: return "上风向"
        return "侧风向"
    station_metrics["sector"] = station_metrics["bearing_deg"].apply(sector)
else:
    station_metrics["sector"] = "未判定"

station_sector = station_metrics.groupby("sector", as_index=False).agg(
    station_count=("station_id","nunique"),
    reading_count=("reading_count","sum"),
    avg_distance_m=("distance_m","mean"),
    avg_aqi=("avg_aqi","mean"),
    max_aqi=("max_aqi","max"),
    avg_pm25=("avg_pm25","mean"),
    avg_pm10=("avg_pm10","mean"),
    avg_no2=("avg_no2","mean"),
    avg_so2=("avg_so2","mean"),
    avg_co=("avg_co","mean")
)
print("10公里内站点按相对输送方向的空气质量汇总：")
print(station_sector.to_string(index=False))

# 时段内排放、风速、站点污染物逐小时汇总，用于识别扩散过程
q_hourly = text("""
WITH pc AS (SELECT id, city_id, district_id FROM polluting_company WHERE id=:company_id),
e AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas::float AS flue_gas, nox::float AS nox
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id=:company_id AND timestamp>=:start_ts AND timestamp<=:end_ts
),
w AS (
  SELECT h.timestamp, h.wind_speed::float AS wind_speed, h.wind_scale::int AS wind_scale, h.wind_direction
  FROM hourly_district_weather h JOIN pc ON h.district_id=pc.district_id
  WHERE h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
),
aq AS (
  SELECT h.timestamp, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)::int AS station_count,
         AVG(h.aqi)::float AS avg_aqi, AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS avg_pm25,
         AVG(h.pm10)::float AS avg_pm10, AVG(h.no2)::float AS avg_no2, AVG(h.so2)::float AS avg_so2
  FROM air_quality_station a
  JOIN pc ON TRUE
  JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=a.id
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id=:company_id), 10000)
    AND h.timestamp>=:start_ts AND h.timestamp<=:end_ts
  GROUP BY h.timestamp
)
SELECT e.timestamp, e.flue_gas, e.nox, w.wind_speed, w.wind_scale,
       aq.station_count, aq.avg_aqi, aq.avg_pm25, aq.avg_pm10, aq.avg_no2, aq.avg_so2
FROM e
LEFT JOIN w ON w.timestamp=e.timestamp
LEFT JOIN aq ON aq.timestamp=e.timestamp
ORDER BY e.timestamp
""")
hourly_dispersion = pd.read_sql(q_hourly, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("逐小时排放-风速-周边站点污染汇总：")
print(hourly_dispersion.to_string(index=False))

# 形成可用于最终回答的简要指标
summary_results = {
    "total_flue_gas": total_flue_gas,
    "peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas,
    "total_nox": total_nox,
    "stations_within_10km": stations_within_10km,
    "weather_scope_used": None if chosen is None else chosen["scope"],
    "avg_wind_speed": None if chosen is None else float(chosen["avg_wind_speed"]),
    "max_wind_speed": None if chosen is None else float(chosen["max_wind_speed"]),
    "avg_wind_scale": None if chosen is None else float(chosen["avg_wind_scale"]),
    "max_wind_scale": None if chosen is None else int(chosen["max_wind_scale"]),
    "dominant_wind_direction": None if chosen is None else chosen["dominant_wind_direction"],
    "mean_to_degree": mean_to_degree
}
print("最终指标汇总：")
print(pd.DataFrame([summary_results]).to_string(index=False))
